surfaces.round2_carry_forward_note: Round-2 evidence is stale. Audit M shipped a cross-platform parity test (artifacts/pilot-dashboard/src/lib/calculations.parity.test.ts) that loads BOTH the dashboard and mobile calc engines and asserts byte-equal output on the exact P1 fixture that failed round-2's C2 surface (P1 with +250 day / +30 night / +10 nvg / +50 captain delta pre-fix). The test now passes — see audit-evidence/2026-04-27/AAZ/C2-parity-test.txt for the run.
